struct TaskQueue {
    items: Vec<Task>,
}

impl TaskQueue {
    fn new() -> Self {
        Self { items: Vec::new() }
    }

    fn enqueue(&mut self, task: Task) {
        self.items.push(task);
    }

    fn dequeue(&mut self) -> Option<Task> {
        if self.items.is_empty() {
            return None;
        }
        // BAD: Vec::remove(0) shifts all elements O(n)
        Some(self.items.remove(0))
    }
}

struct Task {
    id: u64,
    payload: Vec<u8>,
}
